div.h2: Containment Prefix Check: Why canonical[root_len] Matters

tr.td: canonical IS the root dir exactly

div.p: Step A — strncmp strncmp("/var/www/html/index.html", "/var/www/html", 13) compares first 13 bytes: "/var/www/html" == "/var/www/html" → 0 (match)
Step A — strncmp strncmp("/var/www/html2/secret.txt", "/var/www/html", 13) compares first 13 bytes: "/var/www/html" == "/var/www/html" → 0 (match) ⚠ Naive prefix check would PASS here!
Step B — character-after-root canonical[13] = '2' '2' != '/' AND '2' != '\0' → FALSE
Step B — character-after-root canonical[13] = '\0' (end of string) '\0' == '\0' → TRUE
